# google-fonts

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Loads Google Fonts dynamically for typography presets referencing custom web fonts.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Core.Root` → `GoogleFontsLoader`
  - Uses: `config_v2.useConfig`, `ui/theme-engine.useTokenGroupPresets`, `ui/tokens/typography.typographyConfig`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
